item.name: Casket Oyster
item.description:
While there are several theories surrounding the origin of its name, the general consensus is that it is as hard to open as a casket that has been nailed shut. However, it is nothing a brief spell in a pot of boiling water cannot solve.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: Like any casket worth opening, the mollusk locked firmly within this shell is said to be simply to die for. Their valves are often fused to large rocks on the seabed, however, making the task of their harvest quite difficult. Captains often keep caskets of a different sort at the ready in case of emergency.
